use_cases: Display product feature highlights on landing pages
Showcase technology stack compatibility in marketing sections
Add animated visual interest to feature grids
Demonstrate cross-platform capabilities with 3D card animations
Use in feature comparison or technology stack sections
ai_summary: A dark-themed feature card component with automatic 3D morphing animations that cycle through framework icons (React, Next.js, HTML). The card displays a title, description, and continuously animated framework icons with translateY, rotateX, and translateZ transforms creating a hover-like 3D effect. Designed for SaaS and developer tool landing pages to showcase framework compatibility and cross-platform integration capabilities.
